steps.title: Identify the dual requirement of the researcher's claim
steps.content: The researcher claims that feeling frightened boosts both mood and confidence. A quotation that illustrates this claim must show evidence of both improvements.

steps.title: Match the claim to the participant's experience
steps.content: Choice A provides this evidence directly: the participant felt “very accomplished and less stressed” after the haunted house—clearly reporting both confidence and mood improvement. The other choices either focus on external reactions (B), describe fear fading rather than confidence and mood rising (C), or mention relief without addressing both improvements (D). That matches choice A — A is correct.
